name: All-American Egg Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a frying pan to medium-high, reaching about 350 degrees.
2. Combine the garlic, mayonnaise, cream cheese, and mustard in a blender until smooth.
3. Remove the mixture from the blender.
4. Cut each polish sausage into two shorter halves and score lengthwise.
5. Beat the egg and milk with a fork until smooth.
6. Place each sausage half at one end of an egg roll wrapper.
7. Add a dollop of mustard sauce and roll the sausage into the wrapper, sealing the ends with the egg mixture.
8. Fry in hot oil until lightly browned on all sides.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with extra mustard sauce.
